title: jasminum kerstingii
intro: Jasminum kerstingii, also known as Kersting's jasmine or African night-blooming jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Jasminum kerstingii include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
